candidates.row_label: Premium revenue ceded to reinsurers on insurance contracts issued
candidates.why: Reinsurance ceded premium is contra-revenue, not top-line revenue.
Direct top-line insurance revenue under the newer reporting format and populated for recent years.
Broad revenue total and likely best fallback for older format/year where Insurance Revenue is not reported.

variables.notes: Use Insurance Revenue first; Total Revenue as fallback for years under older presentation.

No COGS candidates were provided. For an insurer, direct service costs are best approximated by Insurance Service Expenses in recent years and Claims Incurred in older presentation. Manual review needed because insurance statements do not present a standard COGS line and labels appear to change across reporting regimes.

candidates.why: Would be an SG&A component if present, but preview shows no populated dedicated row and likely incomplete.
Balance sheet row, not an income statement operating expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization should be excluded from SG&A components per instructions.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses suitable income-statement overhead rows. Selected Other expenses and Staff costs as the best SG&A-like overhead components while excluding depreciation/amortization and finance items. Manual review needed because insurer expense presentation is nonstandard and some overhead may also sit in Non-Insurance/Non-Technical Expense or other buckets in older years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other expenses, [Income Statement] Staff costs
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible on the provided statements.

candidates.why: Best available recurring finance-cost line across years; broader than pure interest expense but acceptable if no cleaner interest line exists.

candidates.why: Specific interest expense line, but too narrow because it only covers lease liabilities and is not reported in all years.
Semantically relevant but appears unpopulated/less reliable than Finance expenses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental and not present in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value should not be preferred over a direct reported expense line.
Balancing value should not be preferred over a direct reported expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Use Finance expenses as the primary recurring finance-cost line; lease-liability interest is a narrower fallback only.

candidates.why: Income statement item, not book equity.
Income statement item, not book equity.
Income statement item, not book equity.
Component of equity only, not total book equity attributable to owners.
Component of equity only, not full book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match because it captures parent/owner equity and excludes non-controlling interests.
Usable only if no parent-only equity line exists, but here it would double count with MIB.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner-only equity line; excludes non-controlling interests.

Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance-sheet minority equity.
